encoder_motor_create.message0: Create encoded motor %1 Motor pin A %2 B %3 Encoder pin A %4 B %5 PPR%6 Reduction ratio %7 Phase relationship %8
encoder_motor_create.tooltip: Create an encoding motor object and configure the motor and encoder pins, PPR, and reduction ratio

encoder_motor_set_pid.message0: Set encoding motor %1 PID parameters P%2 I%3 D%4
encoder_motor_set_pid.tooltip: Set speed loop PID controller parameters

encoder_motor_run_pwm.tooltip: Directly set the PWM duty cycle to drive the motor, ranging from -1023 to 1023, negative values reverse

encoder_motor_run_speed.message0: Encoding motor %1 operates at speed %2 RPM (-300~300)
encoder_motor_run_speed.tooltip: Use speed loop to control motor speed, range -300 to 300RPM, negative value reverses

encoder_motor_get_speed.tooltip: Get the current speed of the motor

encoder_motor_get_pwm.message0: Encoding motor %1 Current PWM duty cycle
encoder_motor_get_pwm.tooltip: Get the current PWM duty cycle of the motor

encoder_motor_get_revolutions.tooltip: Get the number of revolutions of the motor. A positive number indicates forward rotation, and a negative number indicates reverse rotation.

encoder_motor_reset_pulse.tooltip: Reset the encoder pulse count to 0 (clear the number of revolutions at the same time)
